texto: You start realizing that maybe you're the one night a month that people have out, and they don't need to hear your political views or how dark you can get. They just want to laugh for an hour and go home. Once I wrapped my head around that, my act evolved accordingly.
explicacao: Citação de Billy Gardell sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You start realizing that maybe you're the one night a month that people have out, and they don't …” articula humor, political, night em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

texto: Everybody wants to be a better version of themselves - everybody. And I hope one day I can lose some weight. Maybe, who knows, I'll hire myself a trainer and a fancy cook. In five years, maybe I'll be an action hero. Then again, maybe I'll just be this guy. Who knows? But the fun part is embracing the human side of that.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Billy Gardell que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “Everybody wants to be a better version of themselves - everybody. And I hope one day I can lose s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, hero, day, com foco em dia-chuvoso e day.

texto: The quickest way to defuse fear or insecurity or anger is usually humor. I think comics figure that out quickly, and, once you figure it out, you think, 'Hey, if I can do this and get paid, that would be kind of cool.'
explicacao: Citação de Billy Gardell sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “The quickest way to defuse fear or insecurity or anger is usually humor. I think comics figure th…” articula reflexao, fear, be-kind em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como be-kind e anger.
